## Theme name

## Preview

Attach a preview without private information or unlicensed artwork.

## Theme style

Examples: minimal dark, high contrast, soft light, glass, nature, abstract, or
creator / recording mode.

## Author

- GitHub account:
- Display name for attribution:

## Asset source and rights

- [ ] I created every included visual asset myself.
- [ ] I own the redistribution rights for every included visual asset.
- [ ] Every included visual asset has a license permitting redistribution.
- [ ] This theme contains no image assets; it uses only colors, gradients, and
      visual settings.

Provide source links, license details, or an original-work statement:

## Permission

- [ ] I permit CodeSkin to include this theme in the public repository and
      official releases.
- [ ] I understand that I must not submit celebrity images, copyrighted
      entertainment artwork, unclear wallpaper downloads, brand assets, or
      other files that I do not have permission to redistribute.
- [ ] I have read [ASSET_POLICY.md](../../ASSET_POLICY.md).

## Testing

- CodeSkin version tested:
- Target-app version tested:
- Was application and restore behavior tested? Yes / No
